Research suggests that solo founders can achieve significant milestones in short periods, but sustainability and team size are crucial factors.", "key_sources": ["Y Combinator", "Techstars", "Paul Graham", "Sam Altman", "Naval"], "gaps_in_current_canon": "Limited data on solo founder velocity and startup progress in the first 30 days", "proposed_action": "Conduct thorough research on startup benchmarks and solo founder velocity to provide an honest assessment of VOLAURA's progress", "whistleblower_flag": null}
summary: VOLAURA's 28-day progress is exceptional, but comparisons to other startups are needed for external validation. Research suggests that solo founders can achieve significant milestones in short periods, but sustainability and team size are crucial factors.
gaps_in_current_canon: Limited data on solo founder velocity and startup progress in the first 30 days
proposed_action: Conduct thorough research on startup benchmarks and solo founder velocity to provide an honest assessment of VOLAURA's progress
